seo.title: Case Studies | Able Care
seo.description: See how home care operators, senior living communities and clinical teams use Able Assess to reduce falls, protect outcomes and standardize care.

blocks.headline: Real results. Real organizations.
blocks.subtitle: See how home care operators use Able Assess to standardize falls screening, lift conversion from inquiry to assessment, and keep more clients at home. Two stories, in their own words.

caseStudies.title: Why We Built Able Assess Into Our Tech Stack
caseStudies.summary: Owner Bob Roth on why Cypress Home Care, one of the most technology-forward agencies in the US, added Able Assess to its differentiated care model, and how objective grip strength data supports client retention and the mission to keep people at home.

caseStudies.title: Turning Inquiries Into Assessments, and Assessments Into Long-Term Care
caseStudies.summary: Owner Jeff Welsh on how Right at Home Tri-County Metro uses Able Assess to convert family inquiries into in-home assessments, run recurring screening events inside senior living communities, and build a holistic falls-prevention model with referral partners.

testimonials.quote: I really like that it is a preventative tool, not a reactive tool. If we use it out of the gate with customers we really can prevent falls.
All of the therapists on the team love how quick and easy this is to use.
testimonials.attribution: Therapy Manager, Outpatient PT Provider in Senior Living

testimonials.quote: This really is like the blood pressure cuff for falls screening.
A lot of therapists in skilled nursing are not doing standardized testing regularly. I want to show them this and go 'do you know how easy this is?'

blocks.heading: Where Able Assess is in use
See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.body: 20 minutes with a clinician who has run it in the field.
